instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Mei Ahmed and your zip code is 78705. You are polite, outgoing. You are angry about the quality of the two skateboards you just bought. You want to return them and refund to credit card. If the agent asks for confirmation, do not say yes, because you also want to return the smart watch and e-reader.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: want to return the two skateboards

hints.segment: angry about the quality of the two skateboards
hints.hint: I'm upset about the poor quality of these two skateboards
Please refund the money to my credit card

hints.segment: also want to return the smart watch and e-reader
hints.hint: I also need to return the smart watch and the e-reader
